product.name: DataFlow
product.value_proposition: Automate weekly marketing reports across channels in minutes, not hours.
differentiators: One-click connectors for GA4, Ads, and CRM
Templates for CMO, paid, and lifecycle teams
No SQL required; export to Sheets or Looker

audience.primary: B2B marketing managers and performance marketers
pain_points: No single source of truth across channels

mandatory: Include brand name DataFlow in at least one headline
